text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian finishes first at the Arima Kinen.
However, she and Biwa Hayahide are both aiming
to achieve even greater goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the stands, Symboli Rudolf's heart leaps
with quiet excitement. She too wants to face
Narita Brian someday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those who have been defeated are aiming for the
top, just the same as Narita Brian. They will
always continue to be her competitors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the curtain falls on the Arima Kinen.
Narita Brian will continue to run from here on out
in her never-ending search for stronger
opponents.
